backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Golden Key Car Rental backend, defining data types (Car, Booking, Review, etc.) and implementing CRUD operations for cars, bookings, reviews, blog posts, user profiles, discount codes, and Stripe payment integration with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping implemented features (visual theme, bilingual RTL support, car listings, etc.) to their corresponding source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON snippet providing a one-line summary for the BlogManagementPanel admin component, describing its blog post creation/editing UI.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, border, and chart colors used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Golden Key Car Rental frontend, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, car listings, booking, dashboard, admin, blog, payment) and wraps the app in a LanguageProvider with RTL/LTR direction switching.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: A full-screen access denied UI component displaying a shield icon, localized error message, and a home navigation button for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/AddOnsSelector.t: A checkbox-based selector component for booking add-ons (Child Seat, Additional Driver, Unlimited KM) that displays icons, daily costs, and a running total for selected items.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogManage: Admin panel for managing blog posts, providing a table view of all posts with create/edit functionality via a dialog form supporting title, content, author, thumbnail, and publish status.
frontend/src/components/admin/BookingMan: Admin table component that lists all bookings and allows admins to update each booking's status (pending, confirmed, cancelled, completed) with a save action per row.
frontend/src/components/admin/CarManagem: Admin table for managing the car fleet, supporting create, edit, and delete operations via a dialog form with fields for name, category, transmission, rate, images, and availability.
frontend/src/components/admin/Promotions: Admin panel for creating and deactivating promotional discount codes, with inputs for code name, expiry date, and a slider for discount percentage.
frontend/src/components/admin/RevenueRep: Admin panel that displays total revenue from completed bookings and a per-vehicle revenue breakdown table with percentage-of-total calculations.
frontend/src/components/admin/StripeConf: Admin panel component for configuring Stripe payment integration, allowing input of a secret key and selection of allowed countries, with status indicators for configured/unconfigured states.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserManage: Admin table component that lists all users with their booking counts and approval statuses, providing approve/reject actions via the setApproval mutation.
frontend/src/components/BlogPostCard.tsx: A card component for displaying a blog post preview with thumbnail, title, excerpt, author, date, and a 'Read More' link that navigates to the full post page.
frontend/src/components/BookingHistoryLi: Renders a list of past bookings with status badges, date ranges, add-ons, and total cost, supporting invoice viewing and cancellation with a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/BookingStepIndic: Displays a horizontal multi-step progress indicator for the booking flow, highlighting completed, active, and upcoming steps.
frontend/src/components/CarFilterPanel.t: Provides a filter panel for the car listing page with controls for search, date range, category, transmission, and max price, plus a clear-all button.
frontend/src/components/CarListingCard.t: Displays a single car's image, availability badge, category, transmission, star rating, and daily rate, with a button to navigate to the car detail page.
Image gallery component with a main photo view, previous/next navigation arrows, dot indicators, and a thumbnail strip for multi-image car listings.
frontend/src/components/CustomerInfoForm: Form component for collecting customer name, email, phone, and driver's license details with inline validation error display.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the brand logo, quick navigation links, a WhatsApp contact link, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, language switcher, and Internet Identity login/logout button. Conditionally shows a Dashboard link and booking CTA based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/InvoiceView.tsx: Modal component that displays a booking invoice summary and allows downloading it as a self-contained HTML file with booking details, add-ons, and total amount.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSwitcher: Small button component that toggles the app language between English and Arabic using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/PricingCalculato: Displays a rental cost breakdown with currency conversion, promo code discounts, and an early payment discount option based on selected dates and add-ons.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSection.t: Dashboard section for viewing and editing the authenticated user's profile (name, email, phone) with inline edit mode backed by query hooks.
frontend/src/components/PromoCodeInput.t: Input field that validates a promo code against the backend and reports the resulting discount percentage to the parent via a callback.
frontend/src/components/ReviewForm.tsx: Form for submitting a star rating and comment review for a specific car, showing a success state after submission.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsList.tsx: Displays a list of car reviews with an average rating summary, individual reviewer info, star ratings, and comments.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: Reusable star rating display component that supports three sizes and an optional interactive mode for selecting a rating.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: A fixed floating button component that opens a WhatsApp chat with a predefined phone number and message when clicked.
frontend/src/constants/contact.ts: Exports static constants for WhatsApp contact info, early payment discount rate, and currency conversion rates and symbols.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for English/Arabic language switching with a comprehensive translation map and a `t()` lookup function.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the application, wrapping backend actor calls for cars, bookings, reviews, users, blog posts, discount codes, and Stripe configuration into typed query and mutation hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display and Inter), and defines a gold/charcoal luxury theme with CSS custom properties, utility classes, RTL support, and custom scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with authentication and admin-role guards, rendering tabbed panels for managing cars, bookings, users, promotions, revenue reports, Stripe config, and blog posts.
frontend/src/pages/BlogListing.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays published blog posts in a responsive grid, with loading and empty-state handling.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPost.tsx: Individual blog post page that fetches a post by ID from the URL params and renders its thumbnail, title, author, date, and paragraph-split content.
frontend/src/pages/BookingFlow.tsx: Multi-step booking flow page that handles authentication gating, add-on selection, customer info validation, cost calculation, and initiates a Stripe checkout session for a selected car and date range.
frontend/src/pages/CarDetail.tsx: Car detail page showing a photo gallery, specs, average review rating, a date picker for booking, and tabs for pricing and reviews, with navigation to the booking flow.
frontend/src/pages/CarListings.tsx: Car listings page that fetches available cars and renders them in a filterable grid using a sidebar filter panel supporting search, category, transmission, and price filters.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for Golden Key Car Rental featuring a hero banner, feature highlights (insurance, support, coverage), and a featured cars section pulled from available inventory.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Payment failure page displayed when a transaction is not completed, offering buttons to retry (go to cars) or return home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success confirmation page shown after a successful booking payment, with navigation to the user dashboard or home.
frontend/src/pages/UserDashboard.tsx: Authenticated user dashboard with tabs for profile management and booking history, including invoice viewing; redirects unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the luxury theme with gold/charcoal color tokens, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Golden Key Car Rental platform's architecture, existing features, known issues, and image requirements for build planning.
